homepage.title: The Premium SvelteKit Boilerplate
homepage.description: Zenith is the most complete foundation for your next SaaS. Save 100+ hours of setup with built-in Auth, Database, and Stripe Subscriptions.
homepage.features.title: Production-ready features
homepage.features.subtitle: Focus on your business, not the infrastructure.
homepage.features.auth.title: Advanced Auth
homepage.features.auth.description: Better Auth integration with Magic Links, Socials, and secure Session management.
homepage.features.db.title: Drizzle & PostgreSQL
homepage.features.db.description: Type-safe database operations with migrations and direct DB access through Drizzle.
homepage.features.i18n.title: Global by Default
homepage.features.i18n.description: Full internationalization with Paraglide JS. SEO friendly and type-safe.
homepage.features.payments.title: Stripe Subscriptions
homepage.features.payments.description: Complete billing system ready to go. Checkout, Customer Portal, and Webhooks.
homepage.features.forms.title: Modern Forms
homepage.features.forms.description: SvelteKit Superforms & Zod. Client-side and server-side validation done right.
homepage.features.emails.title: Email Delivery
homepage.features.emails.description: Resend integration for transactional emails. Clean templates and high deliverability.
login.title: Login
login.description: Login with Google, Apple or Magic Link
